content.en:
The lair of the spirits of legend.

This is a huge void, and there are still many legendary bitter beasts at this time, but they are all weak.

After Ye Tian entered here, these legendary bitter beasts besieged Ye Tian, but they were all solved by Ye Tian.

In a short time, the legendary bitter beasts here were all wiped out.

Subsequently, he slowly searched for the legendary spiritual object.

Soon, he found the legendary spirit object, and it was not one, but four legendary spirit objects.

In front of Ye Tian, four white flowers were born, and these white flowers were legendary spiritual objects, which contained special powers.

"Four legendary spiritual objects, if you cultivate the elders, you can completely cultivate the four elders!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

When any patriarch sees these four legendary spiritual objects, he is afraid that he will be greedy, and now these four legendary spiritual objects have fallen into his hands.

"It's still luck, if I don't help the Sword Clan, I won't be able to get these four legendary spiritual objects!"

Ye Tian put away the four legendary spirit objects and quickly left here.

......

After some time, Jian Heng and the others came out of the legendary bitter sea and successfully returned to the sword domain.

After coming back.

They couldn't wait to take out the innate primordial treasure from the corpse of the ancestor, and buried the corpse of the ancestor in the sword tomb of the Sword Domain.

And they told the story of the legendary bitter sea, and they were amazed at Ye Tian's strength one by one.

Suddenly.

A Legendary Dao Realm elder said, "Patriarch, when the spirit of legend appears, there must be a spirit of legend. That's a legendary spiritual artifact, we can't get it from the Sword Clan, do you want to sell the news to the top elders?"

Jian Heng immediately refused: "Don't do this, do you think Ye Tian will have no idea about that legendary spirit?" He can escape from the siege of the four legendary spirits, if he sends all his clones over, it is possible to kill all the four legendary spirits." Therefore, it is very likely that the legendary spirit object has fallen into Ye Tian's hands. At this time, we sold the information to the top elders, and the top elders didn't find anything in the past, would we be angry with our sword clan? Even, we would offend Ye Tian, and the gains outweighed the losses! In short, don't talk about this matter. "

"Yes!"

Many legends have reached the Tao realm.

......

Legend of the bitter sea.

Ye Tian's copy body is still roaming here, but one of the copy bodies has already brought out the legendary spirit objects and some resources, otherwise it would be too much loss if it accidentally fell here.

As for the other replicating bodies, they spread out in search of various resources.

Gradually, Ye Tian's harvest was naturally more and more, similar to the resources of the legendary ancient tooth stone, he also found some, but occasionally encountered danger, causing the copy body to fall.

this day.

A replica body of Ye Tian encountered a fatal crisis in the depths of the legendary Sea of Bitterness.

He was in the process of shuttling, and was suddenly sucked by an undersea whirlpool in the legendary bitter sea, and then he was directly strangled without the power to resist.

In this case, it is unlucky, and there is no other way.

Moreover, there are also many terrifying legendary bitter beasts in the deepest part of the legendary bitter sea, and the power they can borrow from the legendary bitter sea is very terrifying, even more powerful than the spirit of legend.

The point is, even if you try to kill them, you won't get any good.

Therefore, when encountering these terrifying legendary bitter beasts, Ye Tian avoided them and did not fight them.

The years passed.

Ye Tian's harvest is getting more and more.

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian had already exhausted the second low-quality second-order supreme dao rule item given by the sword clan at this moment, and had successfully comprehended the second-order supreme dao rule to the ninety percent realm, but it was still a lot short of the second sequence supreme dao rule consummation realm.

So, he needs more second-order order items.

"It's a pity that the Sea of Bitterness doesn't give birth to Supreme Dao Rule items. "

Ye Tian said regretfully.

However, he can completely use the resources of the Legendary Ancient Tooth Stone and the Legendary Ancient Sand Crystal to exchange low-quality second-order Supreme Dao Rule items with the patriarchs!

He thought that there would definitely be a senator to trade with him.

The Supreme Void.

Ye Tian issued a task in the Supreme Heavenly Temple, using the legendary ancient tooth stone to trade low-quality second-order Dao rule items, and the specific transaction was negotiable.

The task is to trade with the senators, who will surely know who is trading with him.

Sure enough, it didn't take long for a veteran to contact Ye Tian.

......

The Supreme Void.

Ye Tian met with the patriarch Hai Lao.

"Hai Lao, you want to trade my legendary ancient tooth stone?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Hai Lao nodded, "My Legendary Body is only one step away from transformation, and the resources in my hand are not enough, and the Legendary Ancient Tooth Stone is useful to me, and I do use a second-order Supreme Dao Rule item with low quality, how many Legendary Ancient Tooth Stones can I exchange for a second-order Supreme Dao Rule item?"

Ye Tian said his price: "A low-quality second-order supreme rule item can be exchanged for a hundred legendary ancient tooth stones!"

"Yes!"

Hai Lao was also very straightforward, did not ask for a price increase, and traded directly with Ye Tian.

Soon.

Hai Lao came to the Winter Night Fortress, completed the transaction with Ye Tian, and then left the Winter Night Fortress and went back to retreat.

"A dignified patriarch turned out to be a low-quality second-order supreme rule item!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

It can be seen that the second sequence of Supreme Dao rule items are really rare, even if they are of low quality, they are not easy to find!

Soon after, another senator made a deal with him.

In this way, Ye Tian obtained more and more low-quality second-order Dao rule items.

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian continued to merge with the Innate Primordial Treasure statue, and then comprehended the second sequence of Dao Rule items.

Now, he has traded six second-order supreme dao rule items, two of which contain a lot of second-order supreme dao rule origins, and there is a high probability that he will be able to comprehend the second-order supreme dao rule to ten percent of the realm.

Time flies.

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

As one low-quality second-order supreme Dao rule item after another was consumed, Ye Tian's second-order supreme rule gradually reached the ten-percent perfection realm.

"The second sequence of supreme path rules is complete!"

Ye Tian was very excited, his strength was much stronger now.

Moreover, his Golden Cicada Legendary Body was about to be upgraded to the Consummation Realm, and once it was consummated, he would have to prepare to cultivate the Fifth Sect Supreme Legendary Body.

Another long time has passed.

Ye Tian's Golden Cicada Legendary Body had already reached the consummation realm, and he was ready to cultivate the Fifth Sect Supreme Legendary Body.
